meta.title: Multi-Sport Dashboard
meta.note: Static snapshot. World Cup results through 24 June (Groups A, B and C complete; remaining groups decide 25 to 27 June); AFL through Round 15; NRL through Round 16; Origin series level 1-1, decider 8 July. AFL and NRL for/against and differential figures pending re-verification.

mine: Group D decider · Levi's Stadium, Santa Clara

focus.note: Five wins in a row under interim coach Josh Fraser (Voss departed after Round 9 at 1-8). The 'Blue tsunami' has revived a dead season. Finals are a long shot but mathematically alive.
Four wins from their last five, including a 42-20 demolition of Canberra, but still 11th and about four points outside the eight. Coach Bellamy's 24th and final season.

fixtures: Round 17 · Sat 27 Jun, 7:35pm AEST · 4 Pines Park
Round 18 · Sat 5 Jul, 5:30pm AEST · AAMI Park

origin.state: Series level 1–1 · decider at Suncorp Stadium, Brisbane

games.qldScorers: QLD led 20-0 early. Kalyn Ponga sent off in the 58th minute (7th in Origin history).
games.nswScorers: NSW stormed back a man up: James Tedesco the winning try, Nathan Cleary converting in the rain to win 22-20.

games.qldScorers: Tries: Selwyn Cobbo (3), Trent Loiero, Jojo Fifita, Hamiso Tabuai-Fidow, Lindsay Collins. Goals: Sam Walker 8/8 + 1 pen. MOM Sam Walker.
games.nswScorers: Tries: Kotoni Staggs, Mark Nawaqanitawase (2), Mitchell Barnett. Goals: Nathan Cleary 4.

games.qldScorers: QLD enter as likely favourites after dominating Game 2. Win at home takes the series.

gates.title: Survive the opening two games
gates.req: Needed at least a draw to stay alive. Done: lost to USA, beat Türkiye.

gates.title: Beat Paraguay to reach the Round of 32
gates.req: Win and Australia finish 2nd and qualify directly. A draw means relying on other groups' third-placed teams. A loss almost certainly ends it.
gates.note: Both teams on 3 points. This is effectively a knockout for 2nd behind USA.

gates.title: Win one knockout game
gates.req: Likely face a Group C/E runner-up or a strong group winner. Single elimination from here.

gates.title: Survive the round of 16
gates.req: Win again. Opponents get sharply harder, a likely seeded group winner.

marker.text: The wall: quarter-final is the historical Socceroos ceiling

gates.title: Reach the last 8
gates.req: No Australian men's side has ever gone past the round of 16 at a World Cup. This is uncharted territory.

gates.title: Reach the last 4
gates.req: Beat a genuine title contender. Dreamland.

gates.title: Lift the World Cup
gates.req: Two more wins against the best teams on earth.

gates.title: Build a winning streak
gates.req: Five wins in a row under interim coach Josh Fraser to drag the season off the floor.

marker.text: The wall: 14th to top 8 with 8 rounds left

gates.title: Climb into the top 8
gates.req: Currently 14th on 24 points. The 8th-placed Brisbane are on 32. Carlton must win most of their run home AND have results fall their way. Brutal but not dead.
gates.note: Percentage also needs lifting: they must win big, not just win.

gates.title: Win an elimination final
gates.req: Sneak in at 7th or 8th and you get a sudden-death final, probably away to a top-4 side.

gates.title: Survive week 2
gates.req: Another knockout. Win or season over.

marker.text: Branch: bottom-4 sides almost never win from here

gates.title: Reach the Grand Final
gates.req: Beat a minor-premiership contender, likely interstate.

gates.title: Win the flag
gates.req: One game at the MCG for the premiership. No team has won it from outside the top 8 in the modern era.

gates.title: Steady the ship
gates.req: Four wins from five since Round 11, the only loss to the Bulldogs, to stay in touch with the eight.

marker.text: The wall: 11th, four points outside the eight

gates.title: Force into the top 8
gates.req: 7–8 record, 16 points, about four points behind the 8th-placed Sharks. Storm must win most of their run home and overtake several teams.
gates.note: Bellamy's final season: the dressing-room motivation is real, but the maths is unforgiving.

gates.title: Win a finals game
gates.req: Make the eight and you're dangerous in September, but likely start away to a top-4 team.

gates.title: Survive week 2
gates.req: Knockout football. Storm's big-game pedigree counts here.

marker.text: Branch: lower-8 sides occasionally surge (Storm have the spine to)

gates.title: Reach the Grand Final
gates.req: One win from the big dance. Storm have been here often.

gates.title: Win the premiership
gates.req: Send Bellamy out a champion. Beat the competition's best over 80 minutes at Accor Stadium.
